Reviews.Author: 1y05jymm4n
Reviews.Comment:
Cosmic is a beast in terms of performance, compatibility, and stability. It easily competes with top executors on a technical level.

If you care about performance > Cosmic is top tier
If you care about visual experience > be ready to customize

Final Rating: 4.2/5 | Insane performance held back by a horrible default UI

Categories.Comment:
Cosmic delivers perfect compatibility:

100% sUNC
All functions supported (56/56)
Handles complex scripts with ease

Experience: No major execution issues. Scripts run cleanly and consistently.

High iteration speed (~5.4M/sec)
Stable across all stress levels
Efficient resource usage

Experience: Smooth execution even under heavy loads.

Passed all stress stages
0 vulnerabilities detected out of 113 tested
No instability reported during testing

👉 Experience: Very dependable in real usage.

This is where Cosmic falls apart.

Default UI = old Synapse X style
Visually outdated and honestly unpleasant
Feels clunky compared to modern executors

BUT:

Custom UI support saves it completely

Experience:
Out of the box UI is genuinely bad, but if you install a custom UI, the experience becomes much better.

Strong backend development (based on benchmarks)
Maintains compatibility and performance

Experience: Feels actively maintained, especially on the technical side.
